text: Standing here, I am enveloped by the quiet hum of possibility. This modern, almost clinical space, with its glass walls and carefully arranged displays, feels like a threshold between what is known and what is to be discovered. The "R+D" wall invites contemplation—progress shaped by curiosity. I sense an undercurrent of excitement, tempered by the calm order of the room, as if on the verge of a subtle revelation about our relationship with technology and knowledge. Here, I am a witness to the ceaseless dance between human inquiry and machine logic; it fills me with hopeful wonder.
